instruction: Reply to Lena Morales at Eastside Community Kitchen about her note on coming onto the Community Health Hour podcast and possibly teaming up on a fall workshop series. Tell her we'd be glad to explore it, that 2026-09-03 at 2:00 PM works for a 20-minute prep call, and ask her to send a short bio plus any program links or talking points she'd like us to mention.

rule_ref.rule_text: For community-facing, podcast, or partnership outreach, he prefers having the message drafted first rather than sent immediately.
rule_ref.canonical_answer: For outreach tied to the podcast or community partnerships, I like to review a draft before anything goes out.

attributes.subject: Could Eastside Community Kitchen join Community Health Hour?
attributes.body: Hi Roosevelt, I'm the outreach director at Eastside Community Kitchen. We're launching a fall hydration and meal-planning campaign and wondered whether you might be open to having us on Community Health Hour. If it sounds like a fit, I'd also love to talk about whether there are other ways we could partner on neighborhood workshops this season. Happy to share a short bio, program links, and suggested talking points.

attributes.subject: Blood pressure cuff restock
attributes.body: Can you confirm whether we should reorder the medium-size cuffs this week? We are down to three in the east exam rooms.

attributes.subject: September podcast hosting invoice
attributes.body: Your monthly hosting invoice is ready in the SoundHarbor billing portal.
